title: Macaron BuildSpec Schema
description: Schema for build specification supporting multiple languages, build tools, and metadata.

build_tools.description: The build tools or package managers, e.g., 'maven', 'gradle', 'pip', etc.

macaron_version.description: The version of Macaron used for generating the spec.

group_id.description: The group identifier for the project/component.

artifact_id.description: The artifact identifier for the project/component.

version.description: The version of the package or component.

git_repo.description: The remote path or URL of the git repository.

git_tag.description: The commit SHA or tag in the VCS repository.

newline.description: The type of line endings used (e.g., 'lf', 'crlf').

language_version.description: The version(s) of the programming language or runtime.

build_dependencies.description: List of build dependencies, which includes tests.

build_commands.description: List of shell commands to build the project.

test_commands.description: List of shell commands to test the project.

environment.description: Environment variables required during build or test.

artifact_path.description: Path or location of the build artifact/output.

entry_point.description: Entry point script, class, or binary for running the project.

build_requires.description: Required packages that must be available in the build environment.

build_backends.description: List of build back-end tools used.

has_binaries.description: Flag to indicate if the artifact includes binaries.

upstream_artifacts.description: The artifacts that were analyzed in generating the build specification.
